response.overview: Cikgu Wira is a teacher at Sri Gemilang school in a village. He is a brilliant teacher who has frequently been honored with various awards and prestigious titles at the school. That is, until a new teacher named Cikgu Johan joins the school. Now, Cikgu Wira has a new rival! Different from previous years, the two of them are actively competing to showcase their best performance to win a special award. Not only that, they are also competing to win the attention and love of Cikgu Rose. However, they remain responsible and never neglect student discipline issues and problems. In this intense competition between Cikgu Wira and Johan, various funny stories and incidents occur that stir up the entire Gemilang village!
response.title: Cikgu Terpaling A
